name: 🐛 Bug Report

title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  Thank you for reporting a bug!
  感谢你报告 Bug！请尽量填写以下信息，方便我们复现和修复。
-->

## Describe the bug / 问题描述

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->
<!-- 简洁清楚地描述你遇到的问题。 -->

## Steps to reproduce / 复现步骤

```
1. Run `skl ...`
2. See error: ...
```

## Expected behavior / 期望行为

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->
<!-- 你期望发生什么？ -->

## Actual behavior / 实际行为

<!-- What actually happened? Paste error output below. -->
<!-- 实际发生了什么？请粘贴错误输出。 -->

```
(paste output here)
```

## Environment / 环境信息

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| SkillGit version | `skl -v` |
| Node.js version | `node -v` |
| npm version | `npm -v` |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| Shell | e.g. zsh / bash / PowerShell |

## Additional context / 补充说明

<!-- Screenshots, config (with secrets redacted), related issues, etc. -->
<!-- 截图、脱敏配置、相关 Issue 等。 -->
